title: pinus tabuliformis var. yunnanensis
intro: Pinus tabuliformis var. yunnanensis is a variety of Chinese white pine, a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to the mountainous regions of China and specifically Yunnan province. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pinus tabuliformis var. yunnanensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in the form of resin or essential oil for its therapeutic properties.
